raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (in-model clarification techniques) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical differences.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (the novelty claim needs a citation paragraph), but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for the claims about the baseline and quality metric, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies harmful patterns in the original (overclaiming novelty).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (in-model clarification techniques) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical differences.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation (the novelty claim needs a citation paragraph), but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for the claims about the baseline and quality metric, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies harmful patterns in the original (overclaiming novelty).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability.
